# QA Plan: Sprint 12 — Cozy idle-game register, end-to-end

**Date**: 2026-05-12
**Generated by**: /qa-plan (mixed retroactive + forward-looking — Sprint 12 partially executed pre-emptively on 2026-05-06)
**Scope**: 16 planned Sprint 12 stories (6 Must Have + 5 Should Have + 5 Nice to Have)
**Engine**: Godot 4.6
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-12.md`

---

## Context

Sprint 12's nominal window is 2026-05-26 → 2026-06-04, but autonomous-execution sessions on 2026-05-05 and 2026-05-06 shipped the bulk of the Must-Have scope pre-emptively. This QA plan documents test coverage for items already DONE and provides forward-looking requirements for items still pending.

**Sprint 12 verdict snapshot**:
- ✅ 6/6 Must Haves DONE (M1, M2 with Story 3 deferred, M3 partial, M4, M5, M6)
- ✅ 3/5 Should Haves DONE (S12-S2, S12-S3, S12-S5)
- ⏳ S12-S1 (re-playtest) — pending, needs human
- ⏳ S12-S4 (FormationAssignment Stories 2-4) — pending, skeleton-only at present
- ✅ 2/5 Nice to Haves DONE (S12-N3, S12-N5)
- ⏳ S12-N1, N2, N4 — pending or deferred to Sprint 13+

## Automated Tests Inventory (items already DONE)

### S12-M1 — Economy.recruit_cost — Logic ✅
**Test file**: `tests/unit/economy/economy_recruit_cost_test.gd` (13 tests, Groups A-E)
**Formula** (per ADR-0013 §D.3): `floori(BASE_RECRUIT[tier] × RECRUIT_RATIO^copies_owned)`
**ACs covered**:
- Group A — tier-1 boundary cases (copies 0/1/2/3) — formula correctness
- Group B — tier-2 unit fixture cross-check
- Group C — sentinel paths (null _config, missing tier → -1)
- Group D — pure-function invariants (no side effects, idempotent)
- Group E — AC H-07 geometric-1.8× anchor (cost-curve shape verification)
**Edge cases**: Past-cap copies (returns large but finite); zero copies (BASE only); tier outside [1..max] (returns -1).

### S12-M2 — Recruitment try_recruit transaction — Integration ✅
**Test file**: `tests/integration/recruitment/recruitment_try_recruit_test.gd` (11 tests)
**ACs covered**: AC-RC-04 (happy path: gold deducted, hero added, signal fires); AC-RC-05/06/07/08 (failure paths: insufficient gold, pool empty, capacity full, duplicate); AC-RC-10 (pool mutation isolation); AC-RC-12 (pool_refreshed + counter increment); refresh_pool_paid insufficient/sufficient gold paths; cost-stability adjacent (second warrior = 270 = 150 × 1.8).
**Hygiene barrier**: Snapshot/restore via get_save_data + remove_hero loop between tests.
**Deferred AC**: AC-RC-09 (refund path on add_hero contract violation) — requires DI spy infrastructure; deferred to Sprint 13.

### S12-M3 partial — AC-RC-14 CI grep (Story 8) — Integration ✅
**Test file**: `tests/unit/recruitment/recruitment_single_writer_ci_grep_test.gd`
**ACs covered**: AC-RC-14 (recruitment.gd is the only file outside hero_roster.gd writing add_hero); AC-FA-12 sibling (formation_assignment.gd is the only file outside hero_roster.gd calling set_formation_slot).
**Pending sub-stories**:
- Story 5 (cost-stability invariant tests) — overlap with S12-M2 Group A; defer to Sprint 13+
- Story 6 (Save/Load schema migration) — Sprint 13+ when first version bump occurs
- Story 7 (RecruitScreen UI) — Sprint 13+

### S12-M4 — OfflineProgressionEngine skeleton — Integration ✅
**Test file**: `tests/unit/offline_progression_engine/offline_progression_engine_skeleton_test.gd` (16 tests, Groups A-H)
**ACs covered**: autoload at rank 15 per ADR-0003 Amendment #8; boot subscribes to TickSystem.offline_elapsed_seconds; OfflineSummary 7-field schema locked; cap_reached emits only on strict-greater; cold-launch zero-elapsed silent; re-entrant `run_offline_replay` dropped via _replay_in_flight guard; NOT in CONSUMER_PATHS per GDD §C.7.

### S12-M5 — OE batch chunking + signal suppression + cap — Integration (HIGH-RISK perf) ✅
**Test files**:
- `tests/integration/offline_progression_engine/offline_batch_chunking_test.gd` (20 tests, Groups A-I) — chunked replay loop correctness, adaptive chunk size (deadband [9,15]ms, ratio 0.6, clamp [500, 50000]), suppression flags, flush_offline_signals canonical order, _replay_in_flight cleared before emit
- `tests/unit/offline_progression_engine/offline_forbidden_patterns_ci_grep_test.gd` (10 tests) — all 5 ADR-0014 forbidden patterns enforced (unguarded `gold_changed.emit`, unguarded `first_clear_awarded.emit`, unguarded `_process_kill_events.emit`, flush_offline_signals exceptions, engine flag management)

**Edge cases covered**: re-entrant call rejected with warning; listener exception during emit doesn't leave engine stuck mid-flight; adaptive chunk-size clamps to [500, 50000] ticks.
**Pending verification**: AC-OE-12 5s ADVISORY total wall budget + AC-OE-13 16ms BLOCKING per-chunk budget on **min-spec mobile** — only verified on macOS dev loop. Deferred to Sprint 13+ E2E integration test (GDD Story 10) or platform cert.

### S12-M6 — Audio cue-play (Stories 3-5) — Logic + Visual/Feel ✅
**Test files**:
- `tests/unit/audio_router/audio_router_signal_handlers_test.gd` (23 tests) — AC-AS-04 through AC-AS-08, AC-AS-13
- `tests/unit/ui_framework/ui_framework_helpers_test.gd` Group D (4 tests) — AC-AS-14/15 UI tap chime

**Test pattern** (new precedent — see audio-system.md ADR-candidate flag): `_test_play_sfx_log` / `_test_play_music_log` / `_test_stinger_log` fields populated by play_sfx/play_music/_play_stinger when `OS.is_debug_build()` returns true, allowing tests to assert on cue dispatch without an actual audio device.

**ACs covered**:
- AC-AS-04 — F.1 kill chime pitch (1.0 + (3 - tier) × 0.10)
- AC-AS-05 — F.2 gold throttle (250 ms window, ≤4/s, drops 2nd+)
- AC-AS-06 — F.3 Stinger duck (100ms attack to -3dB, hold, 250ms release)
- AC-AS-07 — F.4 Music crossfade (-80dB to 0dB tween)
- AC-AS-08 — E.8 hydration suppression (defensive check)
- AC-AS-13 — E.7 zero/negative delta early-return
- AC-AS-14/15 — UIFramework UI tap chime + 1-chime-per-press+release

**Manual gap**: All cue tests verify dispatch logic, not perceived audio. Real audibility check pending **S12-S5 binary asset authoring** (currently silent placeholders). Defer to Sprint 13+ sound-design pass.

### S12-S2 — reduce_motion + offline-replay modal — Integration ✅
**Test files**:
- `tests/integration/scene_manager/reduce_motion_clamp_test.gd` (8 tests)
- `tests/integration/scene_manager/offline_replay_modal_coordination_test.gd` (8 tests)

**ACs covered**: reduce_motion persists to `user://settings.cfg`; tween durations clamp to REDUCE_MOTION_CLAMP_MS=50; all 4 duration getters apply clamp; show_modal/hide_modal API distinct from push_overlay; _active_freestanding_modals tracking; `_settings_cfg_path` overridable for test isolation.
**Deviation noted**: CEREMONY instant-cut path documented but not implemented — Story 006 scope, not yet shipped. Current code falls back to `_transition_cross_fade` which picks up the clamp.

### S12-S3 partial — OE Stories 7-8 (re-entry guard + CI grep) — Integration ✅
**Tests**: Already covered by S12-M5 test suites above.
**Re-entry guard**: AC-OE-09 covered by `test_replay_in_flight_flag_transitions_false_post_emit` (chunking suite line 521); AC-OE-10 covered by `test_re_entrant_run_offline_replay_is_dropped_with_warning` (skeleton suite line 197) + `test_replay_in_flight_guard_reentrant_call_rejected` (chunking suite line 497).
**Sprint-plan-vs-GDD mismatch**: Original S12-S3 row described "replay screen + acknowledge" but that's GDD Stories 9-10, not 7-8. Stories 9-10 (Return-to-App Screen UI + E2E test) are DEFERRED to Sprint 13+.

### S12-S5 — sfx/music DataRegistry registration — Config/Data ✅
**Test**: `tests/unit/data_registry/boot_scan_load_order_test.gd` count assertion updated 8→10 to reflect sfx + music categories.
**Architectural piece**: Adds `sfx` + `music` to `DataRegistry.ORDERED_CATEGORIES`; creates `assets/data/sfx/` + `assets/data/music/` placeholder dirs (gitkeep); aligns audio-system.md §C.6 path convention to `assets/data/<category>/<id>.tres`.
**Deferred**: Binary `.wav` / `.ogg` stubs — needs sound-design pass.

### S12-N3 — Save-persist perf verification (Story 015) — Logic (perf) ✅
**Test file**: `tests/perf/save_persist_perf_test.gd` (3 tests)
**ACs covered**:
- AC-7 — persist p95 100-call benchmark — soft-warn at 10ms (PC ADVISORY); hard-fail at 50ms (5× ceiling)
- AC-8 — load p95 100-call benchmark — soft-warn at 50ms; hard-fail at 250ms
- AC-SL-12 — envelope size <50 KB MVP target

**Deferred**: AC-SL-11 mobile BLOCKING (≤50ms persist) — cannot run headlessly; deferred to platform certification.

### S12-N5 — Economy.level_cost formula — Logic ✅
**Test file**: `tests/unit/economy/economy_level_cost_test.gd` (15 tests, Groups A-E)
**Formula** (per ADR-0013 §D.4): `floori(BASE_LEVEL[tier] × LEVEL_RATIO^(level - 1))`
**Sentinel paths**: past-cap, below-level-1, null _config, missing tier → -1
**ACs covered**: tier-1 boundary cases; tier-2 fixture; sentinels; pure-function invariants; AC H-08 geometric-1.6× anchor + total-cost-to-cap range check.
**Scope clarification**: Closes the level_cost surface for Sprint 13+ Level-Up UI. Does NOT replace the +1-per-clear stub from S10-M4 — that's the XP-system implementation, multi-day Sprint 13+ scope.

## Automated Tests Required — Forward-Looking (items still pending)

### S12-S4 — FormationAssignment Stories 2-4 — Integration + UI (PENDING) ⏳
**Required test files**:
- `tests/integration/formation_assignment/commit_signal_test.gd` — Story 2 commit signal contract (signal fires on commit; payload contains formation snapshot; receivers can observe atomically)
- `tests/integration/formation_assignment/length_validation_test.gd` — Story 3 length validation (formation array length contracts; rejection paths for invalid lengths)
- `tests/integration/scene_manager/formation_assignment_screen_test.gd` (already exists as `.gd` + `.uid`) — Story 4 screen integration test extensions

**What to test**:
- Commit signal payload structure per formation-assignment-system.md §J Story 2 ACs
- Length validation rejects 0-length, over-cap, and null-bearing formation arrays
- Screen integration: tap slot → assign hero → commit → signal observed → screen reflects committed state

**Edge cases**:
- Commit during in-flight modal (modal-stack interaction)
- Length validation during partial assignment (some slots filled, commit attempted)
- Screen tear-down mid-assignment (lifecycle hook coverage)

**Estimated test count**: ~10-15 tests across 3 files

### S12-N1 / GDD Stories 9-10 — Return-to-App Screen + E2E test — Integration + UI (DEFERRED Sprint 13+) ⏳
**Required test files**:
- `tests/integration/offline_progression_engine/return_to_app_screen_test.gd` — GDD Story 9 (subscribes to `offline_rewards_collected` + `cap_reached`; renders cozy summary)
- `tests/integration/offline_progression_engine/e2e_min_spec_budget_test.gd` — GDD Story 10 (AC-OE-12 5s ADVISORY + AC-OE-13 16ms BLOCKING on min-spec mobile)

**What to test**:
- Modal renders on signal arrival; dismissed via acknowledge button; safe to skip if no rewards
- E2E: 30-min idle → OfflineSummary populated → modal renders → tap acknowledge → cleared
- AC-OE-13 — every chunk completes within 16ms on min-spec mobile profile (BLOCKING)

**Note**: AC-OE-13 on min-spec mobile cannot run in CI; requires platform-specific perf rig. Plan to time-box as ADVISORY check on macOS dev loop + manual verification at platform cert.

### S12-N2 — Audio Stories 6-7 (hydration suppression hook + tunable curves) — Logic (PENDING) ⏳
**Required test extensions**:
- `tests/unit/audio_router/audio_router_signal_handlers_test.gd` Group F — hydration suppression contract (HeroRoster._suppress_signals = true → AudioRouter._on_* handlers no-op cleanly)
- `tests/unit/audio_router/audio_router_volume_curves_test.gd` (NEW) — post-launch tunable volume curve resolution

**Note**: Story 6 (hydration hook) partially landed during S12-M6 — defensive `HeroRoster._suppress_signals` check in `_on_hero_leveled`. The full Story 6 ACs need verification.

### S12-N4 — FormationAssignment Stories 5-7 — UI + Integration (DEFERRED Sprint 13+) ⏳
**Required test files** (when implemented):
- `tests/integration/formation_assignment/recruitscreen_style_refactor_test.gd` — Story 5 UX-pattern parity with RecruitScreen
- `tests/integration/formation_assignment/named_presets_v1_test.gd` — Story 7 V1.0 forward-compat surface (named presets schema)

## Manual QA Checklist

### S12-S1 — Re-playtest with persisted save (REQUIRED, PENDING) ⏳
**Verification method**: Manual playtest session
**Who must sign off**: producer + qa-tester
**Evidence to capture**: Written notes at `production/playtests/playtest-05-sprint-12-offline-replay-2026-XX-XX.md`

**Sprint 12 playtest extends Sprint 11's re-playtest** — verifies the full cozy idle-game register:

Checklist:
- [ ] Launch fresh Godot build
- [ ] **Recruit flow**: tap Recruit Mage → gold deducted → roster shows new Mage → cost increments per ADR-0013/0015
- [ ] **Formation + dispatch**: assemble 3-hero formation → dispatch to forest_reach floor 1
- [ ] **Clear floor 1**: full combat sequence; gold + XP earned; level-up chime audible (or silent if placeholder)
- [ ] **Close the app** (Cmd-Q / Alt-F4)
- [ ] **Wait ≥30 minutes real-time**
- [ ] **Reopen the app**
- [ ] **Verify**: Return-to-App modal appears (note: pending S12-N1; until then, verify `offline_rewards_collected` signal fires)
- [ ] **Verify**: OfflineSummary content is non-empty (accumulated gold + level-ups)
- [ ] **Verify**: cap clipping kicks in if elapsed > 8h (per ADR-0005)
- [ ] **Verify**: tap continue → level-up chime cascade audible
- [ ] **Verify**: no error toast, no corrupt save modal
- [ ] **Verify**: persisted hero levels + gold + run state restored exactly (Sprint 11 AC-9)

### S12-M6 — Audio audibility (REQUIRED post-S12-S5 binary assets) ⏳
**Verification method**: Audio playback session
**Who must sign off**: audio-director + qa-tester
**Evidence to capture**: Video clip with audio of full session

Checklist (when binary assets land):
- [ ] UI tap on any button plays the tap chime (AC-AS-14/15)
- [ ] enemy_killed plays tier-pitched kill chime (tier 1 highest, tier 3 lowest)
- [ ] boss_killed plays stinger; music ducks -3dB during stinger
- [ ] floor_cleared_first_time plays fanfare stinger
- [ ] hero_leveled plays level-up chime
- [ ] gold_changed plays coin chime (throttled to ≤4/s)
- [ ] Music crossfade between Guild Hall ↔ Forest Reach beds is perceptually smooth (no audible cut)
- [ ] Volume API persists across launches (reduce volume → restart → still reduced)

### S12-M5 — Min-spec mobile budget verification (REQUIRED post-target-hardware availability) ⏳
**Verification method**: Profiler session on min-spec mobile device
**Who must sign off**: technical-director + performance-analyst
**Evidence to capture**: Profile data + perf budget compliance report

Checklist:
- [ ] AC-OE-13 — every chunk completes within 16ms (BLOCKING)
- [ ] AC-OE-12 — total wall budget < 5s for 8h cap (ADVISORY)
- [ ] No frame drops > 50ms during offline replay
- [ ] Battery impact within 1% of idle baseline for 8h replay

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before Sprint 12 QA hand-off:

1. ✓ Game launches to main menu without crash — covered by `mainroot_boot_wiring_test.gd`
2. ✓ **Recruit flow end-to-end** — `recruitment_try_recruit_test.gd` (the marquee Sprint 12 mechanic)
3. ✓ **Offline progression replay** — `offline_batch_chunking_test.gd` (the marquee Sprint 12 anchor)
4. ✓ **Audio cue dispatch** — `audio_router_signal_handlers_test.gd` (verifies dispatch, not audibility)
5. ✓ Save / load round trip still passes — `save_persist_roundtrip_test.gd` (regression guard against Sprint 12 schema changes)
6. ✓ Tamper detection + .bak recovery unchanged — `tamper_detection_test.gd`
7. ⏳ Re-playtest — pending S12-S1
8. ⏳ FormationAssignment Stories 2-4 integration — pending S12-S4
9. ⏳ Min-spec mobile perf — pending target hardware

**Smoke verification status (Sprint 12 items already DONE)**: ✓ PASS. Per S12-M6 closure note, unit + integration suite at **1090 tests / 0 failures / 0 errors** post-M6 commit (`e177e0c`). Per S12-M5 closure note, **1368 tests / 0 failures / 0 errors** post-M5 commit (`fa6dfd9`). Current as of 2026-05-09 (post tick-system Story 005b): **1763/1763 PASS**.

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|---------------|--------------|---------------------|
| S12-S1 (Sprint 12 re-playtest) | Confirm cozy idle-game register feels right end-to-end (recruit → dispatch → offline-replay → audio cascade) | 1 | Solo dev or 1 fresh-eyes tester |
| S12-N1 GDD Story 10 E2E (Sprint 13+) | Verify min-spec mobile perf budget compliance | 1 | Technical-director with target hardware |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes must be written to `production/playtests/playtest-05-sprint-12-offline-replay-2026-XX-XX.md` and reviewed by producer + qa-tester before Sprint 12 can be formally marked CLOSED.

---

## Definition of Done — Sprint 12

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [x] All Must Have acceptance criteria verified — automated via existing tests; **manual playtest AC-9 (S12-S1) PENDING**
- [x] Test files exist at the specified paths for all DONE Logic and Integration stories
- [ ] Manual evidence documents exist for audio audibility (post-S12-S5) and re-playtest (S12-S1) — **PENDING**
- [x] Smoke check passes — 1763/1763 tests passing as of 2026-05-09
- [x] No regressions introduced — verified via full unit + integration sweep
- [x] No S1 or S2 bugs in delivered features
- [x] Code reviewed inline (Solo mode — no `/code-review` runs)
- [x] DONE story files updated to `Status: Complete` (verified for M1, M2 partial, M3 partial, M4, M5, M6, S2, S5, N3, N5)

**Sprint 12 QA verdict (provisional)**: **CLOSED WITH NOTES — pending manual gates.** All automated test evidence for the 6 Must Haves exists; pending items are S12-S1 (re-playtest, human-gated), S12-S4 (FormationAssignment Stories 2-4 implementation + tests), audio audibility post-S12-S5 binary assets, and min-spec mobile perf verification at platform cert.

---

## Sprint 13+ scope (deferred from Sprint 12)

These items appear in Sprint 12's plan but are documented as deferred and should be picked up by Sprint 13+:

- **Recruitment Story 3** — refund path AC-RC-09 (requires DI spy infrastructure)
- **Recruitment Stories 5-7** — cost-stability invariant tests, Save/Load schema migration, RecruitScreen UI
- **GDD OE Stories 9-10** — Return-to-App Screen UI + E2E min-spec budget test
- **Audio binary asset authoring** — needs sound-design pass; AudioRouter degrades to silence until landed
- **FormationAssignment Stories 5-7** — RecruitScreen-style refactor + named-presets V1.0 forward-compat
- **HeroLeveling rank-13 / real XP curve** — replaces the +1-per-clear stub from S10-M4

## Notes

- **Mixed plan**: Most Sprint 12 Must Haves were executed pre-emptively on 2026-05-06 in autonomous mode. This plan documents the resulting test coverage and identifies remaining gaps.
- **New test pattern precedent**: S12-M6 introduced the `_test_*_log` debug-spy pattern for headless audio testing. If a 2nd consumer adopts this pattern, an ADR should codify it (flagged in S12-M6 closure note).
- **Sprint 11 retroactive QA**: See `production/qa/qa-plan-sprint-11-2026-05-12.md` (companion document).
- **Last forward-looking QA plan precedent**: `production/qa/qa-plan-sprint-10-2026-05-05.md`.
